Exodus.subtitle: New
Exodus.synopsis:
Conner's best friend AJ and new friend quantum A.I George, help diagnose what's happening to Conner as his world begins to change.

AJ's and George's realities change too as they join Conner on this adventure.

Genesis.subtitle: Coming Soon
Genesis.synopsis: Growing up in a military family, Conner is moved across the world to follow his fathers career, finally returning to California, a different person.

Revelation.subtitle: Coming Soon
Revelation.synopsis: This story finds Conner investigating multiple realities, finding answers lost in time.
